title: The Tall Women
director: Rudolf Zehetgruber, Gianfranco Parolini, Sidney W. Pink
writer: Mino Roli, Jim Hena Ghar, Sidney W. Pink
actors: Anne Baxter, Maria Perschy, María Mahor
plot: Seven women are the only survivors of an Apache attack on a wagon train. They must cross the desert on foot to escape the Indians who are hunting them.
